CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR, s2 VARCHAR);
SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity > 0;
SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity, s1, s2 FROM test_strings ORDER BY similarity DESC;
SELECT DISTINCT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
WITH similar_pairs AS (SELECT s1, s2, jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE jaccard(s1, s2) > 0.3) SELECT * FROM similar_pairs;
SELECT jaccard(a.s1, b.s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings a JOIN test_strings b ON a.s1 <> b.s1;
CREATE TABLE complex_test AS SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) > 3;
INSERT INTO complex_test SELECT jaccard('12345', '1234'), jaccard('abc', 'xyz');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_strings WHERE jaccard(s1, s2) < 0.5;
SELECT AVG(jaccard(s1, s2)) AS avg_similarity FROM test_strings HAVING avg_similarity > 0.1;
SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings WHERE similarity IN (SELECT jaccard(s1, s2) FROM test_strings);
CREATE VIEW jaccard_view AS SELECT s1, s2, jaccard(s1, s2) AS similarity FROM test_strings;
SELECT * FROM jaccard_view WHERE similarity IS NOT NULL;
